title: erithalis fruticosa subsp. odorifera
intro: Erithalis fruticosa subsp. odorifera, also known as the Fragrant Erithalis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of the Caribbean and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erithalis fruticosa subsp. odorifera include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
